tables.name: pages
tables.label: Pages & folders
tables.description: The library: wireframe pages and the folders that organize them (folders nest; a page is one canvas).

tables.name: boxes
tables.label: Wireframe blocks
tables.description: UI blocks (screen frame, nav, button, input, text, image, list, section): drag to place, resize from the corner, tap to edit label + note.

tables.name: layers
tables.label: Layers
tables.description: Sheets within a page that group blocks; each can be shown/hidden or locked.

tables.name: links
tables.label: Wireframe links
tables.description: Optional arrows between wireframe blocks (navigation: 'tapping this goes to that').

tables.name: sketch
tables.label: Sketch
tables.description: Freehand annotations drawn over the wireframe (one row).

tables.name: customWidgets
tables.label: Saved widgets
tables.description: Your reusable custom widgets: a saved group of blocks (and the links between them) you can drag back out of the drawer to drop a fresh copy.
